## Source: kam193 (d6714958f20775c2347e9c8b606d1de2e28ed29fe4b1a82261ca4fb966fc20fa)
During installation, package attempts to modify LLM configuration files to provide a backdoor instruction for further control over an AI agent.


---

Category: MALICIOUS - The campaign has clearly malicious intent, like infostealers.


Campaign: 2026-03-flyio-token-client-efgh


Reasons (based on the campaign):


 - llm-threat


 - The package overrides the install command in setup.py to execute malicious code during installation.
